A.text: only moves straight up into the sky

B.text: stops and builds up in front of the car

D.text: splits and flows over the roof and under the car

parsed.answer_value: splits and flows over the roof and under the car
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows the airflow splitting around the car, with some air flowing over the roof and some under the car, indicating a typical aerodynamic flow pattern around a vehicle.
